summary: Frontend testing completed for NASSAQ system fixes. All 5 features tested and working correctly: Platform Admin Analytics page, Sidebar 'مركز القيادة' label, no duplicate dashboard title, Schedule page weekly/daily filter, and Add Student wizard.
critical_code_review_comments: LinkIcon import fix in PlatformAnalyticsPage.jsx verified - page loads without errors
Sidebar correctly shows 'مركز القيادة' instead of 'الرئيسية' for school_principal role
SchoolDashboardContent.jsx no longer has duplicate title - only date display remains
SchedulePage.jsx weekly/daily filter working correctly with viewPeriod state and displayedDays logic
Quick Action 'إضافة طالب' button correctly opens AddStudentWizard component
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working correctly. Platform Admin Analytics page shows stats (110 schools, 6000 students, 750 teachers). School Principal dashboard shows real data (100 students, 13 teachers, 12 classes). Schedule page has working weekly/daily toggle with day selector in daily mode.

1_platform_analytics_page.description: Platform Admin Analytics page (التقارير والتحليلات) loads without errors
verified: Stats cards: 110 schools, 6000 students, 750 teachers, 14750 active users
Charts: School distribution by city, Attendance rates, Growth trend
Tabs: نظرة عامة, التقارير, رؤى الذكاء الاصطناعي, الأدوات

2_sidebar_command_center_label.description: Sidebar shows 'مركز القيادة' instead of 'الرئيسية' for school principal
verified: Sidebar first menu item shows 'مركز القيادة' (Command Center)

3_no_duplicate_dashboard_title.description: Dashboard page does not have duplicate title
verified: Only one 'مركز القيادة' title found in page
Date display present without duplicate header
Section title 'مؤشرات الأداء الرئيسية' present as expected

4_schedule_weekly_daily_filter.description: Schedule page has working weekly/daily view filter
verified: Weekly view shows all 5 days (الأحد, الاثنين, الثلاثاء, الأربعاء, الخميس)
Day selector (data-testid='day-select') appears in daily view

5_add_student_quick_action.description: Quick Action 'إضافة طالب' button opens the wizard
verified: Wizard has multi-step tabs: البيانات الأساسية, ولي الأمر, الصحة, المراجعة
Form fields present for student data entry
